phrases.cultural_note: The Olympic Museum has standard and reduced entry fees. Family tickets are available.

responses.english: Twenty francs full price. There are discounts.
responses.phonetic: vant FRAHN plan tah-REEF. eel ee ah day ray-dook-SYON
responses.local: Vingt francs plein tarif. Il y a des réductions.

phrases.cultural_note: The museum has hands-on exhibits: you can try archery, cycling, and rowing simulators. Great for families and sports enthusiasts.

responses.english: Yes, on the second floor. Simulators and touch screens.
responses.phonetic: wee, oh duh-ZYEM ay-TAHZH. see-moo-lah-TUHR ay ay-KRAHN tak-TEEL
responses.local: Oui, au deuxième étage. Simulateurs et écrans tactiles.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the Olympic torch collection
phrases.text_local: Où est la collection des torches olympiques ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh lah koh-lek-SYOHN day torsch oh-leem-PEEK
phrases.cultural_note: The museum displays torches from every modern Olympic Games since 1896 — one of the most impressive collections.

responses.english: On the first floor, in the permanent gallery.
responses.phonetic: oh pruh-MYAY ay-TAHZH, dahn lah gah-luh-REE pair-mah-NAHNT
responses.local: Au premier étage, dans la galerie permanente.

phrases.text_local: Le musée est-il au bord du lac ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh moo-ZAY eh-TEEL oh bor doo lak
phrases.cultural_note: The museum sits on the Ouchy waterfront with stunning Lake Geneva and Alpine views. The terrace café is a highlight.

responses.english: The museum is by the lake, heading down toward Ouchy.
responses.phonetic: luh myoo-ZAY eh oh bor doo lak, ahn day-son-DAHN vair oo-SHEE
responses.local: Le musée est au bord du lac, en descendant vers Ouchy.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the café or restaurant is
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un café dans le musée ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL uhn kah-FAY dahn luh myoo-ZAY
phrases.cultural_note: The museum has a terrace café with views over Lake Geneva. It's open during museum hours.

responses.english: Yes, on the terrace with a lake view.
responses.phonetic: wee, soor lah teh-RAHS ah-VEK vyoo soor luh LAK
responses.local: Oui, sur la terrasse avec vue sur le lac.
